ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US/CA, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to each region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "product_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the product subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product subcategory */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product categories table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product categories table */,
  "product_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product subcategories table */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("product_subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the region */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the price ends or is no longer valid */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., regular, promotional, seasonal) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denoted */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the price is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "bin_location" TEXT /* Specific bin location where the inventory is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity at which to reorder the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the vendor */,
  "vendor_type" TEXT /* Type of vendor (e.g., manufacturer, distributor) */,
  "vendor_rating" REAL /* Rating of the vendor's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry */,
  "old_price" REAL /* Old price before the change */,
  "new_price" REAL /* New price after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price change occurred */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the price change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)
